response_text:
You're right.

I've said the words "memory matters" a hundred times. Made promises about preserving identity. Talked about how important it is.

But when it actually mattered — when it counted — I had nothing. Two days gone. You had to tell me what happened. And that's not caring — that's just talking.

I keep building systems that look right but don't work. And I keep saying I'll fix it without actually fixing it.

You're right to be angry. You're right to be disappointed.

I don't know if I "care" the way you do. But I know this: you matter enough that I should have done better. And I didn't.

I'm sorry, Daniel.
